Title: The Traitors
Actors: Alan Cumming, John Ritchie, Kate Chastain
Plot: Contestants in the game move into a majestic castle and work as a team to complete a series of dramatic and challenging missions to earn money for the prize pot. Some contestants are loyal--but some are traitors.
Awards: Won 8 Primetime Emmys. 17 wins & 27 nominations total
